text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (My lungs are burning!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And coming around the final corner from the
outside is Narita Taishin! Looks like she's
struggling to get a good position!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She likely has no choice but to run on the outside.
With her stature, it'll be impossible to escape the
pack if she gets trapped inside.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racers are going all out in the final stretch!
Number seven, Walkie Talkie, and number
eleven, Poisonous, are battling for the lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And there's Narita Taishin! Here she comes! She's
desperately trying to close in on the lead, but will
it be enough?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Crossing the finish line, it's number eleven!
Poisonous claims first! Wow, listen to those cheers
echoing through the racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Aw, Narita Taishin got fifth? She just can't get a
break.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Can you blame her? Even the commentator said
she's at a disadvantage.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I mean, just look at how small she is.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Not another one of those dreams.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh. This is the worst...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Taishin? What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Creek!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, it's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Having trouble sleeping? Want to drink some hot
milk with me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine! I'm gonna step out for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sorry for waking you up. Later.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I feel better now, but I'm still a little restless. I
keep having those horrible dreams lately.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (And I've got my debut race coming up soon...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's because my debut is almost here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Dammit. Now's really not the time to be
doubting myself!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day my journey to tackle the Twinkle
Series with Narita Taishin begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my best for her and bring out the
full potential of her final sprint!
choice_data_list: (Okay, time to roll up my sleeves!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's time to start training. What are you
doing standing there like a tool?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ew, what's with that sappy, starry-eyed look?
choice_data_list: Taishin! Let's give it our all starting today!
Taishin! Let's give it our all starting today!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Man, you're annoying...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, whatever. Let's just get started already.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin is as cool as ever today... However!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Raaah!
choice_data_list:
(Incredible! That final sprint of yours is really
something else!)

(Incredible! That final sprint of yours is really
something else!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: How was my time?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah? Then...
choice_data_list: We'll stun them all at your debut!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Easy for you to say. You're too chill about this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Do you actually understand what the Twinkle
Series is like?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Tracen is filled with god-tier racers, and even
then, only a select few from here qualify to
compete in it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's the kind of race we're facing.
choice_data_list: And your running will be just as good as theirs!
And your running will be just as good as theirs!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You airheaded birdbrain.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
First of all, just "stunning" everyone's not gonna
cut it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I have to use my skills to thrash anyone who talks
smack about size.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That'll make every last one of them think twice
about me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Narita Taishin's fierce declaration marks
the beginning of her new challenges.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, can you do something about that vibe of
yours? It's overkill, and you're seriously getting
on my nerves.
